Something Borrowed (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,046,489Details
International Box Office $26,037,627
Worldwide Box Office $65,084,116
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,690,488
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,550,329
Total $11,240,817
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Rachel is a talented attorney at a top New York law firm, a generous and loyal friend, and, unhappily, still single - as her engaged best friend Darcy is constantly reminding her. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of the guy she's had a crush on since law school, Dex... who just happens to be Darcy's fiancé. As one thing leads to another in the frantic weeks leading up to Darcy's wedding, Rachel finds herself in an impossible situation, caught between her treasured friendship with Darcy and the love of her life.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,945,368 (35.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.80 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,904 opening theaters/2,904 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,889,784

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 6th, 2011 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 13th, 2012 (Wide) (Bolivia)
Video Release: August 16th, 2011 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content including dialogue, and some drug material.
(Rating bulletin 2155, 1/19/2011)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Scene in End Credits, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Love Triangle, Non-Chronological, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Alcon Entertainment, 2S Films, Wild Oceans Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Rachel is a talented attorney at a top New York law firm, a generous and loyal friend, and, unhappily, still single - as her engaged best friend Darcy is constantly reminding her. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of the guy she's had a crush on since law school, Dex... who just happens to be Darcy's fiancé. As one thing leads to another in the frantic weeks leading up to Darcy's wedding, Rachel finds herself in an impossible situation, caught between her treasured friendship with Darcy and the love of her life.
